race.comment: KONSA (6) five-start Maiden edging towards a win. Produced good closing splits in the heavy (9) going with a narrow second over 1400m at Newcastle. Key jockey change from the good gate and expect to see him race a little closer today. Hard to hold out. FARSET (4) Farnan gelding with his hoof on the till fourth-up. Took control early with the 60.5kg for a courageous second over 1300m at Hawkesbury in the heavy going. King sticks from the good draw and will prove hard to run down. AGRAFFE ROCKET (1) heavily supported on resumption with a slashing third from back in the field over 1300m at Scone. Will keep improving as he gets out in trip. Sure to be thereabouts. ARTGIRL (9) is mixing her distances up this time in and stretches out to her right trip today. Never looked comfortable in the heavy going with a plugging third over 1250m at Canterbury. Likely to be about the mark again.
